mechanism_summary: I2S intercepts the 32-bit signature comparison, logs the cmsSigMCH3Data operand, finds the current FOURCC bytes in the input, and substitutes 'MCH3' at offset 0x10, directly solving the switch gate that naive's blind havoc cannot.
one_line: I2S substitutes MCH3 FOURCC at offset 0x10 to reach switch case

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP buckets the matching-prefix length of the 32-bit signature comparison against 'MCH3'; each closer-prefix input is preserved as corpus, hill-climbing the multi-byte gate that naive's plain edge feedback cannot sense.
one_line: VP prefix-length gradient climbs MCH3 FOURCC switch gate incrementally

mechanism_summary: I2S intercepts the colorspace-field integer CMP against cmsSigMCHFData, logs the 'MCHF' constant, and substitutes it back into the input at offset 0x10, planting the exact 4-byte literal that naive's blind havoc would need a jackpot to produce.
one_line: I2S substitutes MCHF FOURCC at offset 0x10 for switch case gate

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP records Hamming-distance buckets for the colorspace-field comparison against cmsSigMCHFData; each generation of closer-to-'MCHF' inputs adds a new bucket and is retained, ratcheting the 4-byte field toward the exact match across generations.
one_line: VP Hamming gradient ratchets colorspace field toward MCHF switch case

mechanism_summary: I2S reads the switch CMP operands for cmsSigMCH3Data, finds the current FOURCC bytes in the input, and substitutes the 'MCH3' constant at offset 0x10 in one step; lineage dash-row I2S-floor signal confirms this ancestry.
one_line: I2S substitutes MCH3 FOURCC from switch CMP operand at offset 0x10

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs whose FOURCC operand is progressively closer (matching-prefix/Hamming bucket) to the 'MCH3' switch constant, preserving partial-match seeds that havoc completes byte by byte.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP prefix gradient assembles MCH3 FOURCC for switch case

mechanism_summary: I2S intercepts the signature CMP against cmsSigMCHFData, logs both operands, and substitutes the constant 'MCHF' at the matching input offset; the winning seed was produced by a TokenReplace placing 'MCHF' verbatim.
one_line: I2S substitutes MCHF literal via logged CMP operand at input offset 0x10

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP records matching-prefix length of the signature comparison against cmsSigMCHFData; each closer-prefix bucket is preserved, providing the gradient toward 'MCHF' that naive's edge-only feedback cannot supply.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP prefix-length gradient leads to MCHF switch case

mechanism_summary: I2S reads the post-execution CMP buffer of signature/version comparisons inside cmsIsMatrixShaper and substitutes a non-RGB/non-v4 value at the matching header offsets, flipping the profile to a non-matrix-shaper class in one substitution; lineage dash-rows confirm I2S ancestry.
one_line: I2S flips colorspace signature to non-matrix-shaper value via CMP substitution

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP records matching-prefix/Hamming-distance of the signature comparisons inside cmsIsMatrixShaper; inputs whose signature bytes deviate progressively from 'RGB' add new CMP_MAP buckets and are retained, giving a gradient toward a non-matrix-shaper class.
one_line: VP Hamming gradient mutates RGB signature to non-matrix-shaper class

mechanism_summary: I2S reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver entry for the chunk_name==png_sPLT comparison and substitutes the logged png_sPLT constant directly into the input chunk-name bytes; naive with havoc/token only and no CMP introspection never resolves the branch in 10/10 trials.
one_line: I2S directly splices sPLT FOURCC constant into chunk-name bytes

mechanism_summary: VP CMP_MAP gradient feedback preserves inputs whose chunk_name has more matching prefix bytes to png_sPLT than before, retaining partial-match seeds as stepping stones to the full 4-byte match; naive's edge-only feedback gives no signal for partial matches.
one_line: VP preserves partial chunk_name matches as stepping stones toward sPLT FOURCC

mechanism_summary: I2S intercepts the equality compare png_ptr->color_type==3 and records constant operand 3 into the CmpLogObserver; I2SRandReplace substitutes 3 at the IHDR color_type byte offset 0x19, directly satisfying the exact-equality gate that naive must hit by blind chance.
one_line: I2S substitutes constant 3 at IHDR color_type byte to satisfy equality

mechanism_summary: VP CMP_MAP records operand-distance buckets for the color_type==3 compare; inputs whose color_type byte is closer to 3 add new buckets and are retained as stepping stones, climbing the Hamming gradient to the exact value; naive's plain edge feedback discards near-miss inputs.
one_line: VP Hamming gradient retains near-miss color_type bytes to climb to exact 3

mechanism_summary: I2S logs the color_type==PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE CMP operands into the CmpLogObserver buffer; I2SRandReplace substitutes the constant 3 into the input byte where the live color_type value appears, directly flipping the equality without random search.
one_line: I2S directly flips color_type byte to constant 3 by operand substitution

mechanism_summary: VP CMP_MAP records operand-distance buckets for the color_type==3 comparison; a near-value (e.g. 2 or 4) closer to 3 than any prior input adds a new bucket and is retained, ratcheting the byte via a Hamming gradient to exactly 3.
one_line: VP ratchets color_type byte via Hamming gradient to exact constant 3

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads CMP operands from the CmpLogObserver buffer and repairs multi-byte structural literals (DOCTYPE/SYSTEM/entity-name tokens) that gate deeper DTD parsing, enabling a distinct hash triple to be inserted via xmlHashAddEntry3.
one_line: I2S repairs multi-byte DTD structural tokens enabling hash-table insertion

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance buckets reward inputs progressively closer to multi-byte comparison operands gating DTD parsing, accumulating partial progress toward a structurally valid document that inserts a new hash triple.
one_line: VP gradient incrementally builds DTD literal tokens for hash-table entry

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the prolog/markup keyword CMP operands from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the expected literals at their input offsets, reconstructing the '<?xml'/'DOCTYPE' tokens naive havoc corrupts, keeping wellFormed==1 into the entity-ref path.
one_line: I2S repairs XML prolog/DOCTYPE literals to preserve well-formed parse

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient preserves inputs whose keyword CMP operands are progressively closer to the required prolog/markup literals, incrementally completing the structural tokens naive discards when they earn no new edge.
one_line: VP gradient incrementally completes XML prolog/markup literal tokens

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the intercepted *cur=='[' comparison from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes '[' (0x5b) at the host-token offset in the input, planting the required bracket byte that blind havoc rarely produces.
one_line: I2S plants bracket '[' at URI host offset triggering IPv6-literal path

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP writes an operand-distance bucket for each *cur=='[' comparison; an input whose host byte is Hamming-closer to '[' than prior inputs adds a new bucket and is preserved, ratcheting the corpus toward the exact byte that naive's edge-only feedback cannot sense.
one_line: VP gradient ratchets URI host byte Hamming-toward '['

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the table-tag CMP operand from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the expected 'GPOS' bytes at the directory offset, manufacturing the 4CC that selects the GPOS layout path and sets table_index==1.
one_line: I2S plants 4-byte 'GPOS' tag at table-directory offset

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP buckets the operand-distance of the table-tag comparison; each input that brings tag bytes Hamming-closer to 'GPOS' adds a new bucket and is preserved, giving a smooth gradient to the magic 4CC that naive's binary edge feedback cannot follow.
one_line: VP gradient drives 4-byte tag bytes toward 'GPOS' FOURCC

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads intercepted tag-CMP operands from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the expected tag bytes ('GPOS') into the input, planting the exact table tag that naive must hit by blind havoc.
one_line: I2S substitutes 'GPOS' 4CC into sfnt table-directory tag field

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP records Hamming/prefix-distance buckets for tag and header field comparisons; new closer-matching inputs are preserved as corpus, providing a gradient toward the structurally valid font constants that naive cannot follow.
one_line: VP gradient assembles sfnt header and 'GPOS' tag via distance buckets

mechanism_summary: I2S reads tokenizer CMP callbacks and substitutes the exact SELECT keyword bytes and arithmetic-operator tokens into the input, enabling parser acceptance and VDBE compilation so the OP_Lt switch arm is dispatched.
one_line: I2S installs SELECT keyword bytes enabling VDBE OP_Lt switch arm dispatch

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP records per-PC Hamming distance buckets for tokenizer keyword comparisons; seeds incrementally closer to matching SELECT and operator tokens are preserved, gradually building the valid SQL that dispatches OP_Lt.
one_line: VP Hamming gradient incrementally assembles SELECT keyword to reach OP_Lt
